universes.title: The Chrono Chronicles
universes.description: An epic sci-fi universe centering around time-travel paradoxes and memory-stealing temporal storms.

characters.name: Aiden Vance
characters.bio: A rogue chronologist who discovered the first stable wormhole in his garage. He is brilliant but constantly distracted by alternate timelines.

traits.personality: Sarcastic, fiercely loyal, deeply regretful of past timeline edits.
traits.appearance: Mid-30s, windswept graying hair, wears a leather jacket patched with copper wires.
traits.abilities: Can remember alternate timelines that have been erased.

characters.name: Lyra Vance
characters.bio: Aiden's daughter from a future timeline that technically no longer exists. She travels back to warn him of a looming timeline collapse.

traits.personality: Highly focused, disciplined, carrying the weight of a dying world.
traits.appearance: Late teens, athletic build, silver cybernetic left eye.
traits.abilities: Possesses future knowledge and advanced temporal weaponry.

chapters.title: Echoes of a Future
chapters.content:
Chapter 2: Echoes of a Future

The temporal storm hit without warning. Aiden woke up on his garage floor to the sound of shattered glass and a blinding flash of light.

Standing in front of the flickering temporal rift was a young woman. Her clothes were scorched, and her left eye gleamed with a metallic, cybernetic sheen.

She looked directly at Aiden, her eyes widening in disbelief. "Dad?" she whispered.
